001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025
026/**
027 * Typed tree façade over the generic-collections model ({@link MarshalledMap} / {@link MarshalledList} and their
028 * {@link JsonMap} / {@link JsonList} subclasses).
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * This is a <b>live, mutating view</b> (a façade — <i>not</i> a parallel node hierarchy) wrapping a single backing
032 * value which is one of:
033 * <ul>
034 *    <li>a {@link Map} (an <i>object</i> node),
035 *    <li>a {@link List} (an <i>array</i> node),
036 *    <li>a scalar value ({@link String}, {@link Number}, {@link Boolean}, etc.) (a <i>value</i> node), or
037 *    <li><jk>null</jk> (a <i>null</i> node).
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * It gives Jackson-migrants the ergonomics they expect (node-type introspection, typed value accessors, and fluent
042 * tree building) without replacing the underlying {@link Map}/{@link List} representation. Because it is a live view,
043 * mutating builders such as {@link #put(String,Object)} and {@link #add(Object)} mutate the backing container
044 * <i>in place</i> — callers holding the underlying map/list see the change. Use {@link #copy()} for an independent
045 * deep-copy snapshot.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
048 * <p class='bjava'>
049 *    <jc>// Build a tree fluently (mutates a backing JsonMap/JsonList in place).</jc>
050 *    MarshalledNode <jv>node</jv> = MarshalledNode.<jsm>objectNode</jsm>()
051 *       .put(<js>"a"</js>, 1)
052 *       .put(<js>"b"</js>, MarshalledNode.<jsm>arrayNode</jsm>().add(<js>"x"</js>).add(<js>"y"</js>).value());
053 *
054 *    String <jv>json</jv> = Json.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>node</jv>.value());  <jc>// {"a":1,"b":["x","y"]}</jc>
055 *
056 *    <jc>// Navigate and read typed values.</jc>
057 *    Integer <jv>a</jv> = <jv>node</jv>.get(<js>"a"</js>).asInt();      <jc>// 1</jc>
058 *    String <jv>x</jv> = <jv>node</jv>.get(<js>"b"</js>).get(0).asString();  <jc>// "x"</jc>
059 * </p>
060 *
061 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
062 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
063 * </ul>
064 *
065 * <p>
066 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation typed tree model layered over the
067 * {@code Marshalled*} collections and may change incompatibly in a future release.
068 */
069public class MarshalledNode {
070
071   /**
072    * Wraps any value as a node.
073    *
074    * <p>
075    * The value is stored as-is (no copy): a {@link Map} becomes an object node, a {@link List} becomes an array node,
076    * a non-<jk>null</jk> non-container value becomes a value node, and <jk>null</jk> becomes a null node. For navigation
077    * and fluent building to work the value should be (or contain) the {@link MarshalledMap}/{@link MarshalledList}
078    * family, but any {@link Map}/{@link List} is accepted.
079    *
080    * @param value The value to wrap. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
081    * @return A new node wrapping the value, never <jk>null</jk>.
082    */
083   public static MarshalledNode of(Object value) {
084      return new MarshalledNode(value);
085   }
086
087   /**
088    * Creates a new object node backed by a new empty {@link JsonMap}.
089    *
090    * @return A new object node, never <jk>null</jk>.
091    */
092   public static MarshalledNode objectNode() {
093      return new MarshalledNode(new JsonMap());
094   }
095
096   /**
097    * Creates a new array node backed by a new empty {@link JsonList}.
098    *
099    * @return A new array node, never <jk>null</jk>.
100    */
101   public static MarshalledNode arrayNode() {
102      return new MarshalledNode(new JsonList());
103   }
104
105   private final Object value;
106
107   private MarshalledNode(Object value) {
108      this.value = value;
109   }
110
111   /**
112    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this node wraps a {@link Map} (an object node).
113    *
114    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this is an object node.
115    */
116   public boolean isObject() {
117      return value instanceof Map;
118   }
119
120   /**
121    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this node wraps a {@link List} (an array node).
122    *
123    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this is an array node.
124    */
125   public boolean isArray() {
126      return value instanceof List;
127   }
128
129   /**
130    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this node wraps a non-<jk>null</jk> scalar (not a {@link Map} or {@link List}).
131    *
132    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this is a value node.
133    */
134   public boolean isValue() {
135      return value != null && ! (value instanceof Map) && ! (value instanceof List);
136   }
137
138   /**
139    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this node wraps <jk>null</jk>.
140    *
141    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this is a null node.
142    */
143   public boolean isNull() {
144      return value == null;
145   }
146
147   /**
148    * Returns the backing value converted to a {@link String}.
149    *
150    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a value node or the value cannot be converted.
151    */
152   public String asString() {
153      return asScalar(String.class);
154   }
155
156   /**
157    * Returns the backing value converted to an {@link Integer}.
158    *
159    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a value node or the value cannot be converted.
160    */
161   public Integer asInt() {
162      return asScalar(Integer.class);
163   }
164
165   /**
166    * Returns the backing value converted to a {@link Long}.
167    *
168    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a value node or the value cannot be converted.
169    */
170   public Long asLong() {
171      return asScalar(Long.class);
172   }
173
174   /**
175    * Returns the backing value converted to a {@link Double}.
176    *
177    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a value node or the value cannot be converted.
178    */
179   public Double asDouble() {
180      return asScalar(Double.class);
181   }
182
183   /**
184    * Returns the backing value converted to a {@link Boolean}.
185    *
186    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a value node or the value cannot be converted.
187    */
188   public Boolean asBoolean() {
189      return asScalar(Boolean.class);
190   }
191
192   /**
193    * Converts the raw backing value to the specified type.
194    *
195    * <p>
196    * Unlike the scalar accessors, this works on object nodes too (e.g. converting a {@link Map} object node to a bean).
197    * Routes through the same conversion machinery used by {@link MarshalledMap#get(String,Class)}.
198    *
199    * @param <T> The type to convert to.
200    * @param type The type to convert to.
201    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the backing value is <jk>null</jk> or cannot be converted.
202    */
203   public <T> T as(Class<T> type) {
204      if (value == null)
205         return null;
206      try {
207         return MarshallingContext.DEFAULT_SESSION.convertToType(value, type);
208      } catch (InvalidDataConversionException e) {
209         return null;
210      }
211   }
212
213   /**
214    * Returns the raw backing value wrapped by this node.
215    *
216    * @return The raw backing value. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
217    */
218   public Object value() {
219      return value;
220   }
221
222   /**
223    * Returns the child node for the specified key on an object node.
224    *
225    * @param name The key.
226    * @return The child node, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not an object node or the key is absent.
227    */
228   public MarshalledNode get(String name) {
229      if (value instanceof Map<?,?> value2 && value2.containsKey(name))
230         return new MarshalledNode(value2.get(name));
231      return null;
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Returns the element node at the specified index on an array node.
236    *
237    * @param index The zero-based index.
238    * @return The element node, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not an array node or the index is out of range.
239    */
240   public MarshalledNode get(int index) {
241      if (value instanceof List<?> value2 && index >= 0 && index < value2.size())
242         return new MarshalledNode(value2.get(index));
243      return null;
244   }
245
246   /**
247    * Returns the number of entries (object) or elements (array) in this node.
248    *
249    * @return The size, or <c>0</c> if this is a value or null node.
250    */
251   public int size() {
252      if (value instanceof Map<?,?> value2)
253         return value2.size();
254      if (value instanceof List<?> value2)
255         return value2.size();
256      return 0;
257   }
258
259   /**
260    * Adds or replaces an entry on an object node, mutating the backing {@link Map} in place.
261    *
262    * @param name The key.
263    * @param value The value.
264    * @return This object.
265    * @throws IllegalStateException If this is not an object node.
266    */
267   @SuppressWarnings({
268      "unchecked" // Backing map of an object node always accepts String keys / Object values.
269   })
270   public MarshalledNode put(String name, Object value) {
271      if (! isObject())
272         throw illegalState("put(String,Object) is only valid on an object node.");
273      ((Map<String,Object>)this.value).put(name, value);
274      return this;
275   }
276
277   /**
278    * Appends a value on an array node, mutating the backing {@link List} in place.
279    *
280    * @param value The value to append.
281    * @return This object.
282    * @throws IllegalStateException If this is not an array node.
283    */
284   @SuppressWarnings({
285      "unchecked" // Backing list of an array node always accepts Object elements.
286   })
287   public MarshalledNode add(Object value) {
288      if (! isArray())
289         throw illegalState("add(Object) is only valid on an array node.");
290      ((List<Object>)this.value).add(value);
291      return this;
292   }
293
294   /**
295    * Returns a new node backed by a deep copy of this node's backing value.
296    *
297    * <p>
298    * Maps are copied into new {@link JsonMap} instances and lists into new {@link JsonList} instances (recursively);
299    * scalars and <jk>null</jk> are returned as-is (they are immutable). Mutating the copy does not affect the original
300    * and vice versa.
301    *
302    * @return A new independent node, never <jk>null</jk>.
303    */
304   public MarshalledNode copy() {
305      return new MarshalledNode(deepCopy(value));
306   }
307
308   /**
309    * Returns the node addressed by the specified <a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901">RFC 6901</a>
310    * JSON Pointer relative to this node's backing value.
311    *
312    * <p>
313    * A read-miss (missing key, out-of-range index, or type mismatch) returns <jk>null</jk> so callers can null-check.
314    * If the addressed value exists and is JSON <jk>null</jk>, a null node is returned (use {@link #isNull()} to test it).
315    * The empty pointer addresses this node's whole backing value.
316    *
317    * @param pointer The RFC 6901 JSON Pointer.
318    * @return A node wrapping the addressed value, or <jk>null</jk> if the addressed value is absent.
319    */
320   public MarshalledNode at(String pointer) {
321      return find(pointer).orElse(null);
322   }
323
324   /**
325    * Optional read variant of {@link #at(String)}.
326    *
327    * @param pointer The RFC 6901 JSON Pointer.
328    * @return The addressed node (present, possibly a null node), or an empty {@link Optional} if the addressed value is absent.
329    */
330   public Optional<MarshalledNode> find(String pointer) {
331      var o = JsonPointer.of(pointer).evalOrMissing(value);
332      return JsonPointer.isMissing(o) ? opte() : opt(new MarshalledNode(o));
333   }
334
335   /**
336    * Writes the specified value at the location addressed by the specified
337    * <a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901">RFC 6901</a> JSON Pointer, mutating the
338    * backing container in place and auto-vivifying missing intermediate containers.
339    *
340    * <p>
341    * Intermediate containers are created based on the next token (a numeric or <c>-</c> token implies a {@link JsonList},
342    * otherwise a {@link JsonMap}); the <c>-</c> token on a list appends. Because the backing value is <jk>final</jk>,
343    * the empty (root) pointer cannot replace this node's whole document in place and is therefore rejected.
344    *
345    * @param pointer The RFC 6901 JSON Pointer. Must not be the root pointer.
346    * @param value The value to set.
347    * @return This object.
348    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If <c>pointer</c> is the empty/root pointer.
349    */
350   public MarshalledNode set(String pointer, Object value) {
351      var p = JsonPointer.of(pointer);
352      if (p.isRoot())
353         throw illegalArg("Cannot set the whole document via the root pointer on a node.");
354      p.set(this.value, value);
355      return this;
356   }
357
358   /**
359    * Removes the member or element addressed by the specified
360    * <a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901">RFC 6901</a> JSON Pointer.
361    *
362    * @param pointer The RFC 6901 JSON Pointer.
363    * @return The removed value, or <jk>null</jk> if the addressed member/element was absent.
364    */
365   public Object remove(String pointer) {
366      return JsonPointer.of(pointer).remove(value);
367   }
368
369   private <T> T asScalar(Class<T> type) {
370      if (! isValue())
371         return null;
372      try {
373         return MarshallingContext.DEFAULT_SESSION.convertToType(value, type);
374      } catch (InvalidDataConversionException e) {
375         return null;
376      }
377   }
378
379   private static Object deepCopy(Object v) {
380      if (v instanceof Map<?,?> v2) {
381         var r = new JsonMap();
382         v2.forEach((k, val) -> r.put(String.valueOf(k), deepCopy(val)));
383         return r;
384      }
385      if (v instanceof List<?> v2) {
386         var r = new JsonList();
387         v2.forEach(e -> r.add(deepCopy(e)));
388         return r;
389      }
390      return v;
391   }
392}
